netease_music.name: NetEase Cloud Music
netease_music.description: Play history from NetEase Cloud Music app

sync_mode.label: Sync Mode
sync_mode.description: How NetEase Cloud Music history should be synchronized.

sync_interval_minutes.label: Sync Interval (minutes)
sync_interval_minutes.description: Polling interval used for interval-based sync.

min_play_duration.label: Minimum Play Duration (seconds)
min_play_duration.description: Tracks played for less than this are ignored so quick skips do not become timeline items.

db_path.label: Database Path
db_path.description: Path to the NetEase Cloud Music local.db playback database.

initial_sync_policy.label: Initial Sync Scope
initial_sync_policy.description: How much history to seed into the timeline on the first sync.

tag_strategy.label: Genre Tag Source
tag_strategy.description: How genre or style tags are added to listened tracks.

lastfm_api_key.label: Last.fm API Key
lastfm_api_key.description: Required when Genre Tag Source is set to Last.fm. Apply for a free key at last.fm/api/account/create.

enabled.label: Enabled
enabled.description: Whether NetEase Cloud Music history sync is active.

sync_mode.label: Sync Mode
sync_mode.description: How NetEase Cloud Music history should be synchronized.

sync_interval_minutes.label: Sync Interval (minutes)
sync_interval_minutes.description: Polling interval used for interval-based sync.

min_play_duration.label: Minimum Play Duration (seconds)
min_play_duration.description: Tracks played for less than this are ignored so quick skips do not become timeline items.

db_path.label: Cache Database Path
db_path.description: Defaults to the standard NetEase cache database path. If NetEase settings show a cache folder such as C:\Users\<you>\AppData\Local\NetEase\CloudMusic\cache, do not paste that folder here. Choose the database file under the sibling Library directory instead, usually C:\Users\<you>\AppData\Local\NetEase\CloudMusic\Library\webdb.dat.

initial_sync_policy.label: Initial Sync Scope
initial_sync_policy.description: How much history to seed into the timeline on the first sync.

options.from_now: Only new records from now on

tag_strategy.label: Genre Tag Source
tag_strategy.description: How genre or style tags are added to listened tracks.

lastfm_api_key.label: Last.fm API Key
lastfm_api_key.description: Required when Genre Tag Source is set to Last.fm. Apply for a free key at last.fm/api/account/create.

summary.listened: Listened to 《{track_name}》 by {artist_name} (album: {album_name}) on NetEase Cloud Music for {duration_min} min
summary.listened_with_alias: Listened to 《{track_name}》 by {artist_name} ({alias}) on NetEase Cloud Music for {duration_min} min
summary.listened_no_album: Listened to 《{track_name}》 by {artist_name} on NetEase Cloud Music for {duration_min} min
summary.listened_no_artist: Listened to 《{track_name}》 on NetEase Cloud Music for {duration_min} min

summary_features.genre_coverage: Genre tags appeared on {tagged_events} of {total_events} listening events.

legacy_fields.tag_strategy_desc: How to extract genre/style tags for listened tracks
legacy_fields.lastfm_api_key_desc: Required when using Last.fm strategy. Get a free key at last.fm/api/account/create
